codeReview.summary: The feature correctly migrates Axum AppState from a Tokio RwLock<HashMap<...>> implementation to the shared SessionStore abstraction, and handlers/tests were updated consistently to use the new synchronous store accessors without changing API behavior.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill expectations, and commit diff for m5-migrate-axum-to-session-store. Implementation matches the feature description/expected behavior, routes handler session operations through SessionStore-backed AppState, removes the old Tokio lock glue, and includes aligned test updates with no blocking or non-blocking defects found.
